title: omp manifest.json
description: File & dataset inventory for a project folder. Metadata-only: omp NEVER copies/moves/pushes the actual data — it records checksum, size, split, and lineage so changes are detectable and provenance is traceable. If DVC/git-lfs manages the data, omp defers and mirrors metadata only.

generated.description: ISO timestamp this manifest was last written.

managed_by_external.description: If a versioning tool (DVC, git-lfs) is detected, record it here. omp then only mirrors metadata and does not claim ownership.

path.description: Relative path to the data file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the file (hashlib, deterministic across OS). 'UNHASHED' allowed for files too large to hash on registration (size+mtime tracked instead).

rows.description: Optional row count for tabular data.

split.description: Train/val/test split membership, to detect leakage across splits.

group.description: Split-group id; siblings sharing a group are one split set.

lineage.description: Where this data came from and how it was produced.

added.description: ISO date registered into the manifest.
